author.name: Borja Garcia de Soto (garcia.de.soto@nyu.edu) and Nas Gopee

description: Official LaTeX template for manuscripts submitted to ISARC, the International Symposium on Automation and Robotics in Construction. Provides the required title/author/affiliation/email formatting, bold abstract and keywords blocks, three levels of numbered headings, figure/table/equation formatting with landscape support, and automatic reference formatting via BibTeX.
